currentMandate: Build the Covenant-governed AI hedge fund: analyst agents, risk engine, portfolio management, and backtest infrastructure.
spiritOfTheWork: Risk as constitutional law, not afterthought. Every position is bounded by volatility and correlation. Every analyst produces uniform signals. The system trades with discipline, not conviction alone.
whatToProtect: The AnalystSignal interface -- all analysts must produce uniform outputs. The risk engine position limits -- no trade may bypass risk controls. The separation of LLM-augmented (value, macro) and computation-only (quant) domains.
currentTemptations: Skipping risk checks to simplify the trading loop
Letting LLM analysts produce free-form output instead of structured signals
Building a UI before the backtest engine proves the system works
Over-engineering the analyst philosophies instead of shipping working analysis
whereWeAre: Project scaffolded. Agent definitions written. Risk and portfolio engines implemented. Next: wire analysts to data sources, build the backtest loop, validate with historical data.
